attributes.name: OIC - 12U Travel Tryout Tune-Up Clinic June 2026
attributes.description:
Bears 12U Tune-Up Clinic
Want to get ready for Tryouts? OIC is excited to offer Tune-up clinics to all travel players to help you gear up for your tryouts! These 4 sessions will continue skills developed during spring season and prepare for upcoming Fall season tryouts! 

Birth years (2014-15) 

12U Tune-Up Schedule: 

Mon June 1 6:30pm - 7:30pm (OLY) 
Wed June 3 6:30pm - 7:30pm (OLY) 
Mon June 8 6:30pm - 7:30pm (OLY) 
Wed June 10 6:45pm - 7:45pm (NHL)
